/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DEFT WV CPX/X:ZACHARY THUNDER AND CARVELLOUS DAVIS ARE NOT CHARGED ON THE SAME COMPLAINT,  HOWEVER, THEY EACH AGREE TO HAVETHEIR PRELIMINARY HEARINGS HEARD CONCURRENTLY/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/X:COURT GRANTS DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO HAVE INVESTIGATING OFFICER TESTIFY FIRST/ /INVOFF:SGT REESE BURROWS/WIT SWORN DA:SGT, REESE BURROWS/WIT SWORN DA:OFF, BRENT DAWSON/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, 2 STILL PHOTOGRAPHS; PEOPLE'S 2:VIDEO/EXHM:DEFENSE A, ONE PAGE STATEMENT OF SF POLICE DEPT INCIDENT REPORT/X:EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:1043EC (PITCHESS) MOTION/NP/X: RONNI WAGNER IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT,/X:COURT STATES ON THE RECORD RE: THE MATERIALS TO BE RELEASED,/X:THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED A PARTIAL STIPULATION,  THE WRITTEN STIPULATIONIS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/X:POLICE LEGAL SHALL DELIVER RELEVANT MATERIALS TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW BY 07-29-15; MATERIALS, IFANY, SHALL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENSE BY 08-12-15,/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:SPR IS DENIED/X:SUB, SF GENERAL HOSPITAL RECORDS OF DEFENDANT ARE RELEASED TO DEFENSE (WITH STIPULATION)/CTORD:PEOPLE TO MAKE AVAILABLE ADDITIONAL DISCOVERY THAT IS INPOSSESSION OF THE POLICE DEPARTMENT (DUE 7-13-15 AT NOON)/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED/DOP/
/CAL:DISCOVERY STATUS AND OR MOTION/X:RELEASE ON OR IS DENIED/BAIL:75000/30    CSPR ELIG REPORT, DOP/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT AND PREHEARINGCONFERENCE ON 07-08-15/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO COMPEL/X:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND PRELIMINARY HEARING DATES ARE CONFIRMED/ /CONTD:DISCOVERY STATUS AND DEFENSE MOTION FOR OR/DOP/

/CAL:DEF MOTION FOR RELEASE ON OR AND BAIL REDUCTION/X:EMI YOUNG, CERTIFIED LAW CLERK, IS SPECIALLY APPEARING UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF PD CHRISTOPHERHITE/X:SUBPOENAED CAD RELEASED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL/ /X:DEFENSE MOTION FORRELEASE ON OR & BAIL REDUCTION IS DENIED/X:FUTURE COURT DATES ARE CONFIRMED/CONTD:DEFENSE MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS/
